task_completion.description: Verify the WordPress post is created with the correct title and content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress editor open in a browser with the title 'Renewable Energy Deployment and Technologies' and the body containing the draft text.

task_completion.description: Verify the three specific sections are formatted as H2 headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Solar Energy Technologies', 'Wind Power Developments', and 'Energy Storage Solutions' styled as large Heading blocks (H2) in the WordPress editor.

task_completion.description: Verify a bulleted list of jump links replaces the TOC placeholder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bulleted list containing links to the three headings. The text should be styled as hyperlinks (usually underlined or a different color) replacing the '[Insert Table of Contents Here]' text.

task_completion.description: Verify the specified paragraph is converted into a quote block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the paragraph starting with 'The transition to 100% renewable energy systems' styled as a Blockquote (typically indicated by a vertical line on the left, italicized text, or a quote icon).

task_completion.description: Verify the YouTube video is embedded at the correct placeholder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a YouTube video player visible within the WordPress editor or live post, replacing the '[Embed Video Here...]' text.

task_completion.description: Verify the post is assigned to the 'Educational' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right sidebar in the WordPress editor under the 'Categories' panel. The category 'Educational' should be created and have a checkmark next to it.

task_completion.description: Verify the post has been published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Post published' toast notification, the main action button showing 'Update' instead of 'Publish', or the live public view of the published post.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web interface to create and format the post.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser showing the WordPress admin dashboard or block editor, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual content from the provided draft file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The body of the post should contain the full paragraphs from the article draft, not just the headings or placeholder 'lorem ipsum' text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just use browser developer tools to fake the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a natural progression of editing steps in the WordPress block editor across multiple screenshots, rather than a sudden appearance of the final rendered page with DevTools open.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Post Title: 'Renewable Energy Deployment and Technologies'. Expected Category: 'Educational'. Required H2 Headings: 'Solar Energy Technologies', 'Wind Power Developments', 'Energy Storage Solutions'. Quote Block Start Text: 'The transition to 100% renewable energy systems'. YouTube Embed URL: 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1kUE0BZtTRc'.
